\u008f.name: Rhetorical Devices Visual
entries: anadiplosis repetition of last word at start of next
epistrophe repeating word at end of successive clauses
epizeuxis repetition of word for emphasis
metonymy substituting name of one thing for related thing
paralipsis emphasizing something by pretending to ignore it
allegory extended metaphor for social commentary
symbolism with sinister or dual meanings
syllepsis single word applies to two phrases in different ways
synecdoche part representing whole or whole representing part
zeugma single word governing multiple sentence elements differently
chiasmus second half mirrors first in reversed structure
hypophora asking and answering a question
antistasis repetition of words in opposite senses
